actions.subject: HIGGS Settlement Gap
actions.preview: HIGGS is saying their total settlement seen on dashboard is $14,359.21 but only received $14,162.45 — gap of $196.76.
actions.summary: HIGGS reporting a $196.76 discrepancy between dashboard and actual received amount, across all 3 of their games (Words, Klondike, Gearpaw). Started since the merge restyle launched a few days ago.
actions.draft: Hey Nic, looking into this now. Will come back to you shortly with what's causing the gap.

actions.subject: Merchant Can't Locate Payment
actions.preview: Hey Roby, it seems like they can't locate the payment still.
actions.summary: Merchant still can't find a payment. Jasmine shared the screenshot you provided but they're saying they've yet to receive it. Asking for additional supporting documentation — and notes she has no dedicated contact to escalate to.
actions.draft: Hey Jasmine, no worries. Can you share the transaction ID and the merchant's bank name? I'll pull the wire details from our end so we have a full payment trail to send them.

actions.subject: Audit Confirmation Letters Overdue
actions.preview: Could you please provide the confirmations printed on your letterhead and signed by you at your earliest convenience?
actions.summary: Auditors sent confirmation letter drafts on May 27 for SVB, APT Pay, Mercury, and Brex. Now chasing for signed copies on letterhead. Waiting 6 days with no reply.
actions.draft:
Hi Dwiti, apologies for the delay — I'll get these signed and back to you today.

Rob

actions.subject: Worldpay SOC Reports — Auditor Sign-off Needed

Hi Alain, yes these should cover it — I'll confirm with the auditors and let you know if they need anything additional.

Rob

Rob

actions.subject: Settlement Account Follow-Up
actions.preview: Just checking here to see if the settlement account has made any progress? Also need to do an initial top up of our escrow account for payouts.
actions.summary: Gabe submitted the settlement form on May 29 as requested and is now following up (4 days later). Also needs to arrange an escrow top-up per Tim's instructions.
actions.draft:
Hi Gabe, the settlement account is being set up now — I'll have details across to you shortly. On the escrow top-up, please send funds to [account details] with "Spintime" as the reference.

Rob

actions.subject: Payout Funding Setup Question
actions.preview: Since we are using only the payouts option, how does funding work? It's not really a 'settlement' process.
actions.summary: Yuliy replied with their Group VP Finance Jack Zhang added. Asking how the escrow funding model works for a payout-only setup.
actions.draft:
Hi Yuliy and Jack, for the payout-only setup, you'll fund a merchant escrow account on our side, and we draw from that to fulfil payouts. Please send the initial top-up to [account details] with "Blazesoft" as the reference. Happy to jump on a call if helpful.

Rob

actions.subject: Call Scheduling — Jun 1 or Jun 2?
actions.preview: Sorry your email came in 2:50AM PST — not sure if you meant 6/1 or 6/2 at 5PM EST.
actions.summary: Kevin sent the same message twice asking for clarification on the call date. Still waiting for a response.
actions.draft:
Hi Kevin, apologies for the confusion — let's do today Jun 2 at 5pm EST. Does that still work for you?

Rob

Rob
